prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第73名，近年排名稳定在60-73区间，属于中上水 平理工类211院校；近年该校无明显负面舆情事件，抖音平台关注度一般，未进入全国高校热度前100名，报考热度处于平稳状态；第五轮学科 评估数据中该校未被收录，但石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程为传统王牌学科，化学工程与技术、安全科学与工程等也具有较强实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；内蒙古2026年高考总人数约154000人，较2025年（物理类+历史类约116360人）大幅增加约32%，竞争显 著加剧；该校位于山东青岛，属东部沿海城市，对内蒙古考生有一定跨省吸引力；学校在内蒙古招生规模较大（理科80-9 1人），属于该校在省外的重要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10183、2026年扩招5人（+6.25%）的缓解作用、以及内蒙古考生总数大幅增加约32%带来的竞争加剧 压力，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约10715名，区间10215-11215名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 15293 → 11594 → 15281 → 12283 → 10183, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend. In the past two years, it moved from 12283 to 10183, a cumulative advance of about 2100 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10183. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category) is: 2021: 91 → 2022: 84 → 2023: 77 → 2024: 76 → 2025: 80 → 2026: 85. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 5 students (+6.25%), which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 73rd, with recent rankings stable in the 60-73 range, placing it among mid-to-upper level 211 engineering universities. In recent years, there have been no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin platform attention is average, not entering the top 100 in national university popularity, indicating stable application heat. The fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not included, but petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering are traditional ace disciplines, while chemical engineering and technology, safety science and engineering also have strong strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (physics category + history category about 116,360), markedly intensifying competition. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Inner Mongolian students. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia (80-91 students in science), making it an important source of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10183, the mitigating effect of a 5-student expansion (+6.25%) in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a roughly 32% increase in total Inner Mongolian exam takers, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10715, with a range of 10215-11215.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10215-11215, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction. Tier 1 majors can be attempted as a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range), while Tier 3 majors serve as a safe backup. Although petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering, and other petroleum core majors have the strongest disciplinary strength (A+), the industry is highly cyclical, so personal career planning should be considered. Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information, and automation have high social popularity and broad employment prospects, suitable for students seeking diversified development.
